description_long: This factory building complex features a large, rectangular main structure with a flat roof, numerous tall industrial windows, and a modern industrial aesthetic. The main building is accompanied by two smaller auxiliary buildings, one of which appears to be an office or administrative space, and the other possibly a storage or utility shed. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, with visible parking spaces and a couple of vehicles parked nearby. The complex includes a fenced outdoor area with a sizable swimming pool, suggesting amenities for staff or visitors. The rooftop of the main building is equipped with what appears to be a small pool or water feature, and there are visible mechanical installations, likely HVAC units, on the roof. The color palette is dominated by dark gray, white, and beige tones, with clean lines and a functional, utilitarian design.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with a large main building, tall windows, two auxiliary structures, a driveway, and a fenced pool area. The flat roof features visible rooftop machinery and a small water feature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main factory building with its tall windows, driveway, two parked vehicles, and both auxiliary buildings in the background.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the main building, the auxiliary buildings, and the fenced pool area to the right.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool area prominently in the foreground, with the main building and auxiliary structures behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main building's side facade, rooftop features, and the pool area to the left.
